publicationStmt.p: Digital editions of summaries in Tours' Bibles

bibl.author: Donatien de Bruyne
bibl.title: Sommaires, divisions et rubriques de la Bible latine

bibl.author: B. Bischoff
bibl.title: Katalog der festländischen Handschriften des neunten Jahrhunderts (mit Ausnahme der wisigotischen)

msDesc.head: Biblia latina (Iosue, Ruth). 2nd volume of Mordramnus' Bible

supportDesc.extent:
II + 128 + II folios
height 300 mm width 200 mm

II + 351 folios
height 352 mm width 260 mm

msDesc.head: Biblia latina Veteris et Novi Testamenti

source.p: First period of the Turonian production according to Fischer's classification (p. 257).

supportDesc.extent:
II + 214 folios
height 405 mm width 295 mm

handDesc.handNote: Carolingian minuscule by different hands (at least five)

source.p: Excluded from the Turonian production according to Fischer's classification (p. 252).
Second period of the Turonian production according to Fischer's classification (p. 259).

msDesc.head: Biblia latina Veteris Testamenti (incomplete: from Ex 12.23 to Mi 4.9)

handDesc.handNote: Carolingian minuscule of c. twelve hands

source.p: Second period of the Turonian production according to Fischer's classification (p. 259).

handDesc.handNote: Carolingian minuscule of several different hands

source.p: Second period of the Turonian production according to Fischer's classification (p. 260).

msDesc.head: Biblia latina (Vulgata). Part 1: Genesis to Psalms

source.p: Second period of the Turonian production according to Fischer's classification (p. 261).

msDesc.head: Biblia latina Veteris et Novi Testamenti

source.p: Third period of the Turonian production under Fridugisus (periode II) according to Fischer's classification (p. 261).

msDesc.head: Biblia latina Veteris et Novi Testamenti

source.p: Fourth period of the Turonian production under Fridugisus (periode II) according to Fischer's classification (p. 262).

msDesc.head: Biblia latina Veteris et Novi Testamenti

origin.origPlace: Tours, Abbey St. Martin or Marmoutier (Fischer, p. 263)

source.p: Fourth period of the Turonian production under Fridugisus (periode II) according to Fischer's classification (p. 263).

msDesc.head: Biblia latina Veteris et Novi Testamenti

source.p: Second period of the Turonian production under Adelard (periode III) according to Fischer's classification (p. 264).

msDesc.head: Biblia latina Veteris et Novi Testamenti (The "Moutier-Grandval Bible")

source.p: Third period of the Turonian production according to Fischer's classification (pp. 264-265)

msDesc.head: Biblia latina Veteris et Novi Testamenti

source.p: Third period of the Turonian production according to Fischer's classification (p. 265).

msDesc.head: Biblia latina ("First Bible of Charles the Bald")

supportDesc.extent:
I + 423 folios
height 495 mm width 375 mm

source.p: Fourth period (Abbot Vivian, 843-851) of the Turonian production according to Fischer's classification (p. 267).

msDesc.head: Biblia Latina Veteris et Novi Testamenti

supportDesc.extent:
I + 382 + I folios
height 495 mm width 350 mm

source.p: Fifth period (853-c.900) of the Turonian production according to Fischer's classification (p. 268).

listWit.witness: text of series A as printed by D. de Bruyne, Sommaires..., p. 42

tagsDecl.rendition: the digital reproduction is b/w, impossible to determine color

head.note: In contrast to all the other Tours Bibles, P3 (Paris, BnF, lat. 47) attests de Bruyne’s B series (p. 43-45) rather than the A series.

rdgGrp.rdg: INCiPiuNT CAPituLa IN LIBRO IESU NAVE
INCiPiuNT CAPiTuLa IN LIBRO IESU NAVE
INCiPiT CAPIT CAPITULATIO LIBri IESU NaVe

app.rdg: INCiPit CAPITULATIO IN LIBRO IESUM NAVE

item.title:
Promittit deus iosue dicens sicut fui cum moyse moysen moysi ero et
et tecum

app.lem: Praeparare prȩparare praepara praeparare preparare cibaria iubetur populo
app.rdg: Iubet iosue populo populum populo ut praeparet sibi cibaria
ammonens etiam rubenetas et gadditas et dimidiam tribum manasse ut conlocantes familias suas in terram quam tradiderat tradiderit tradiderat eis moyses et praecederent armati sicut moyse promiserant

item.title:
Destinantur exploratores explaratores a iosue mittuntur a iosue de sethim duo uiri exploratores in hiericho
quos recipiens domo raab meretrix celabit

title.q:
hodie incipiam exaltare exlatare exaltare te coram omni israhel ut sciant quia sicut fui
cum moyse moysi moyse
s
ita et tecum sum

item.title: Iubente domino siccauit alueus iordanis euntis transeunte israhel

Duodecim lapides electi electi lapides
leuati sunt de iordanis alueo
a duodecim uiris de duodecim tribubus quos posuit iosue in galgalis
ob pro o? ob
commemorationem
commemoratione futuri temporis
reuersusque est fluuius ad cursum suum et ascendit populus de iordanne decimo mensis prima die
Introeunte israhel terram chanaan territi sunt cuncti reges regis
Haec autem causa est secundae secunde secundum secundae circumcisionis
Hucusque comederunt manna

Ostendit se angelus domini iosue qui dixit princeps principes princeps
exercitus domini exercitus domini exercitus
sum sui
De obsidione uel subuersione muri hiericho
Imprecatio inpraecatio inprecatio inpraecatione iosue
Praeuaricatio puaricatio praeuaricatio populi
Confortat dominus iosue ad praeliandum proeliandum praedicandum
Perturbatio regum
Simulatio gabaonitarum

Conglobati quinque vque reges contra iosue ascenderunt
XVIII tunc imperauit soli et stetit spatium spacium spatio
diei unius unius diei
Iuuante domino extincti sunt reges cum exercitu suo

Ruben
et gad et dimidiae dimidiȩ dimediae dimidiæ dimedie dimediæ
tribui tribu? tribui tribu manasse terram sibi dari dare postulantes
s
a moyse
Hi hii sunt reges terrae terrȩ terræ quos percussit iosue et filii israhel
Diuidere terras populis hortatur dominus iosue

Promissum repetit reppetit
chaleb caleb chaleb montem in
in quo hebron hic legis regis legis adam situm
est

app.rdg: possessio filiorum iudae per sortem et quia gebuseum habitatorem hierusalem non potuerunt filii iuda delere sed habitauit cum eis usque in presentem diem

app.lem: Sors filiorum ioseph ephraim et manasse
app.rdg: possessio filiorum ioseph efraim et manasse per sortem et quia chananeum qui habitabat in gazer non potuerunt filii ephraim delere sed habitauit cum eis usque in presentem diem tributarius et quia filiabus salphaad dedit iosue possessionem iuxta imperium domini in medio fratrum patris earum

item.title:
Filii fillii ioseph petunt petent petant sibi augmentari augmentarii funiculum a
a iosue quibus ait ascendite in
montem et succidite siluam et mundate uobis ad habitandum abitandum habitandum habitandam habitandum
spatia spacia

app.lem: Congregatique sunt omnes filii israhel in silo
app.rdg: Congregatique sunt omnes filii israhel in silo

item.title:
Destinantur uiri uir* uir ad describendam discribendam describandam terram reuersique descriptionem discriptionem describtionem tradunt iosue qui misit sortes fortes coram domino in silo sylo
diuisitque diuisique diuisitque terram filiis israhel in septem partes
Urbes urb? urbes leuitarum

Post bellorum turbines data est et
requies a domino

Inconsulta re facta a tribu ruben reben ruben altare inmensae inmense inmensæ inmensȩ
magnitudinis

Replicat a principio iosue cuncta israheli cum obtestatione ne discedant discant discedant discant a praeceptis prȩceptis præceptis domini appropinquante adpropinquante
die
die? die
obitus sui
Unde natus sit abraham uel ubi perductus item congregatis cum pacto obtestationis adloquitur alloquitur eos iosue

rdg.title: Congregatum israhel iosue sub pacto obtestationis adloquitur et scribens uerba sua in uolumine tulit lapidem grandem et posuit eum supter quercum in testimonio

Mortuus est iosue centum decem annorum et sepultus est in possessione sua in monte ephraim ossa quoque ioseph quae tulerant filii israhel de aegypto sepelierunt in sichem in partem agri quem emerat iacob a filiis emmor centum nouellis ouibus nam et eleazar filius aaron mortuus est et sepelierunt eum in gabaath in monte efraim
